title: Houthis threaten to attack shipping tankers if they use Saudi Arabian ports on Red Sea
description: Warning to shipping companies, on top of Iran’s chokehold on strait of Hormuz, may severely affect Saudi oil exports
content:
Yemen’s Iranian-aligned Houthis have warned shipping companies that their tankers risk being attacked if they use Saudi Arabian ports, as the militia moved quickly to enforce a blockade announced the previous day.

title: Burnham has forced greater clarity at Thames Water. Now he must choose

content:

title: Liverpool 'will sign' Barcola as they confirm third summer transfer with FSG to 'spend big'
description: Liverpool will sign Bradley Barcola "as a minimum" this summer with the Reds set to "spend big" this summer, according to reports.
content:
Liverpool will sign Bradley Barcola “as a minimum” this summer with the Reds set to “spend big” this summer, according to reports.
